intentSynonyms: get a chat info in telegram
look up a chat info in telegram
fetch a single chat info in telegram
view one specific chat info in telegram
get chat or channel details in telegram
description: Get detailed information about a group chat or channel, including title, description, member count, and type. Works for both regular groups and supergroups/channels.

is_channel.description: Whether this is a channel/supergroup (default false — regular group)
